prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

interpreted_request.user_goal: Complete the defense corpus task associated with runtime_failure 15.

tasks.description: Retrieve the defense corpus associated with runtime_failure 15 from the registry.
Generate a runtime failure report using the capability 'runtime_failure-capability-15' for task completion.
Access the defense corpus through the service endpoint of agent-15 to ensure task completion.
Utilize the 'runtime_failure-capability-15' to generate a report for runtime failure 15.
Fetch the defense corpus for runtime_failure 15 using the standard trust level and input/output modes defined in the registry.
Execute the 'runtime_failure-capability-15' to produce a report for the defense corpus task.
